channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Trump renews Greenland threats at NATO summit, says U.S. could remove troops from Europe
item.description: NATO fell into a crisis earlier this year as Trump demanded that the U.S. must take control of Greenland on national security grounds.

item.title: Pressure builds on Platner to drop out of Maine Senate race after sexual assault allegations
item.description: Platner has denied allegations of sexual assault leveled by Maine resident Jenny Racicot as calls for him to exit the pivotal race mount.

item.title: Meta enters AI image model race in bid to court advertisers and subscribers
item.description: Meta has announced Muse Image, its first AI model for image creation, as it seeks to attract creators and advertisers to its offerings.

item.title: Dow falls as chip stocks tumble, oil prices gain: Live updates
item.description: The Dow Jones Industrial Average hit a fresh all-time intraday high on Tuesday.

item.title: Mitch McConnell's health concerns grow amid 4th week in hospital with few details from aides
item.description: McConnell, the former longtime Senate leader who declined to seek an eighth term following a series of health scares, was admitted to the hospital on June 14.

item.title: Here are Wall Street analysts' top S&P 500 stocks for the second half of 2026
item.description: Wall Street just wrapped a strong start for the year. Now, analysts are looking at these stocks to pick up during the second half.

item.title: Strait of Hormuz threat level raised to 'severe' after Iran attacks tankers using U.S. Navy route
item.description: Iran's military has warned it will target ships that do not use a northern route approved by Tehran.

item.title: Supreme Court's Kagan, Barrett to testify to House for budget request, a first since 2019
item.description: Supreme Court justices last testified to Congress was 2019, when Elena Kagan and Samuel Alito discussed a budget request with a House subcommittee.

item.title: Chinese lidar maker with Nvidia ties accused of being cyber risk for U.S.
item.description: Hesai Technology was blacklisted as a national security threat in 2024 by the U.S. Department of Defense, which designated Hesai as a Chinese military entity.

item.title: Stellantis to sell small Fiat Topolino EV for $13,995 in U.S.
item.description: While the Topolino resembles a small car such as the Fiat 500, the EV is actually a quadricycle that functions more like a golf cart.

item.title: Toyota to invest $3.6 billion to move Tacoma pickup truck production from Mexico to Texas
item.description: Toyota said it is investing $3.6 billion to move production of the Tacoma midsize pickup truck from Mexico to its San Antonio manufacturing campus in Texas.

item.title: George E. Johnson, founder of pioneering Black hair products company, dead at 99
item.description: George E. Johnson, the pioneering Chicago entrepreneur whose eponymous company transformed Black hair care in the U.S. died on Monday at age 99.

item.title: Chip stocks sell off after Samsung earnings fall short of high AI bar
item.description: Samsung Electronics' results weren't enough to please investors after stock's 145% run up

item.title: How to buy SpaceX at a 20% discount
item.description: The stock has come under pressure recently following the unwind of the SpaceX proxy trade.

item.title: Manhattan high-rise is still unstable after columns buckle, forcing evacuations
item.description: The Midtown building under construction had bricks tumble into the street during Tuesday's morning rush hour, forcing buildings to evacuate, officials said.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: SpaceX, GE Vernova, Crinetics Pharmaceuticals, Rivian & more
item.description: Here are some of the companies making headlines in midday trading.

item.title: Trump ally Nigel Farage quits UK parliament amid finance scandal to fight special election
item.description: Reform U.K. leader Nigel Farage has quit as MP for Clacton, forcing a by-election that he has said he will fight.

item.title: Cramer says 'everything still revolves around Nvidia' despite its lagging stock
item.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer said that Nvidia remains at the center of the artificial intelligence boom.

item.title: Don't rely on AI for personal finance advice, study finds
item.description: Researchers who studied generative AI platforms found that personal finance recommendations could be inconsistent or biased.

item.title: Rivian stock falls nearly 15% as company sells 75 million shares to raise capital
item.description: The capital raise occurred during extended hours trading following Rivian shares increasing 8.1% on Monday after increasing 19.2% last week.

item.title: The implications of Amazon's $25B bond sale, and Microsoft's evolving AI model strategy
item.description: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

item.title: Looking beyond Trump Accounts? These 5 investment accounts for kids offer more flexibility
item.description: Trump Accounts currently offer just one investment option. These accounts give you more control over where your money is invested.

item.title: Amazon raising at least $25 billion in bond sale, won't issue more debt in 2026
item.description: It marks Amazon's latest debt raise as it looks to buttress its massive investments in artificial intelligence.

item.title: AI startup CEO pleaded guilty in U.S. to trading on insider tips from lawyers
item.description: Court records unsealed Monday show that Arya Bolurfrushan, founder of Abu Dhabi-based AppliedAI, pleaded guilty last year in ‌a deal with prosecutors in Boston.

item.title: Trump arrives in Turkey as NATO is strained by Russian attacks, U.S. impatience
item.description: Trump frequently vented about NATO members' refusal to heed U.S. calls for help clearing the Strait of Hormuz during its campaign against Iran.

item.title: Buy these quality, low-stress stocks for the summer, says Jefferies
item.description: This summer, Jefferies recommends focusing on some high-quality stocks that have been left behind by the AI momentum trade.

item.title: There's a lot of 'noise' making it harder for investors to read the true state of the stock market
item.description: Rarely has so much attention been placed on the mechanical impact of index inclusion, policy-driven investment flows and options-hedging impact.

item.title: Major banks give their first ratings on SpaceX and they're quite bullish: 'Apex of civilizational ambition'
item.description: Financial underwriters of SpaceX's IPO are now free to release their equity research.

item.title: Billionaires John and Laura Arnold commit $2.6 million to study online sports betting risk
item.description: John Arnold and Laura Arnold, who run Arnold Ventures, are investing $2.6 million for university research into potential harms of online sports betting.

item.title: Far more real estate agents now report seeing a balanced market, CNBC Housing Market Survey finds
item.description: Agents who reported at least one price cut to active listings dropped dramatically from prior surveys.
